use clap::{Parser, ValueEnum};

#[derive(Clone, ValueEnum)]
enum OutputFormat {
    Json,
    Text,
    Csv,
}

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, value_enum)]
    format: OutputFormat,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    let output = match cli.format {
        OutputFormat::Json => "json output",
        OutputFormat::Text => "text output",
        OutputFormat::Csv => "csv output",
    };
    println!("{output}");
}
